Motion To Compel Productions Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel production of documents is granted in part. Plaintiff is ordered to produce all responsive documents and verifications by November 8, 2005. Any documents withheld shall be identified in a privilege log. A complete log shall be provided to defendant on or before November 8, 2005. In addition, plaintiff is ordered to produce redacted bills and invoices for David Rand. The amount of the fee, identification of payment by case file name, and the general purpose of the work performed are not protected from disclosure by either the attorney client or attorney work product privilege. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion for relief from waiver of objections is granted as to the assertion of the attorney client and attorney work product privileges. The general objections and preliminary statement are ordered stricken. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
